name: Quiche Specialite
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the pie shell for 10 minutes at 400 degrees.
2. Wash spinach and mushrooms twice.
3. Cook mushrooms in a skillet with butter, salt, pepper, and garlic to taste until cooked through. Drain well.
4. Cook spinach in boiling salted water. Drain and cool. Extract all water.
5. In a large bowl, combine spinach, mushrooms, and sour cream. Check seasoning and mix well together.
6. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
7. Sprinkle cheese on top for a full covering.
8. Bake at 350 to 400 degrees for 30 minutes.
9. Cool before serving so the mixture can set better. Can be kept in the refrigerator for several days. Will not freeze.
